name: Will Hudson
description: Canadian-American composer, arranger, and big band leader
abstract: Will Hudson (né Arthur Murray Hainer; March 8, 1908 –  July 16, 1981) was a Canadian-born American composer, arranger, and big band leader who worked from the mid-1930s through the mid-1950s.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Barefield
about_quotes.evidence: Will Hudson (PHONETIC) had brought us one chorus arranged on 'Moonglow' to the Cotton Club... Cab said... we'll do Moonglow... Eddie Barefield, you take the second chorus as a solo

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmie Crawford
about_quotes.evidence: he made Will Hudson our arranger... I remember that junk like drum... Will Hudson used to write

about_quotes.speaker: Waldren "Frog" Joseph
about_quotes.evidence: I'll never forget this old, I think it was Will Hudson, the ramming on some kind of serenade.
